agendas.label: Grid Absolutism
agendas.demand: The relay houses demand census-anchored order in Relay Ward before private lineages rebuild their own sovereign grids.

agendas.label: Ancestor Furnace
agendas.demand: The ember courts want the forest margin mapped and provisioned before ancestral law is dissolved into imported property logic.

agendas.label: Mercy Powder Market
agendas.demand: The pharmacate insists that Velvet Arcade remain supplied through tolerated contraband rather than punitive morality.

agendas.label: Unburial Sermon
agendas.demand: The choirs seek processional authority in Ash Basilica so forgetting becomes governance instead of panic.

agendas.label: Shrine Perimeter
agendas.demand: The frontier princes demand militia hardening along the rail frontier before migration routes become colonial choke points.

agendas.label: Confession Index
agendas.demand: The brass missionaries want every district converted into legible inventory, beginning with the forest margin.

missions.label: Map the Inheritance Groves
missions.briefing: Navigate the contested forest margin and document clan furnace-routes before the border war closes all access.

missions.label: Negotiate Clinic Corridors
missions.briefing: Broker safe passage through armed clinic-wardens and establish a licensed supply chain before the mercy market collapses.

missions.label: Disrupt the Reliquary Audit
missions.briefing: Enter the basilica archives and prevent the dual inventory of the dead from becoming a permanent governance mechanism.

missions.label: Secure Junction Three
missions.briefing: Rally frontier escorts and clear the third rail junction before shrine bands convert it into a permanent devotional blockade.

incidents.label: Census
incidents.summary: Archivists, confessors, and quartermasters map the district population to turn rumor into policy leverage.

incidents.label: Agenda Crisis
incidents.summary: The pharmacate insists that Velvet Arcade remain supplied through tolerated contraband rather than punitive morality.

incidents.label: Scenario Flashpoint
incidents.summary: The Velvet Arcade has declared itself an autonomous medical-pleasure state. Armed clinic-wardens enforce dosing schedules, and all commerce passes through narcotic patronage.

incidents.label: Scenario Flashpoint
incidents.summary: The dead now outvote the living in district governance. Reliquary inventories have become census rolls, and mourning has become compulsory civic service.

incidents.label: Vice Surge
incidents.summary: A narcotic and pleasure-market wave destabilizes ordinary trade and inflames faction opportunism.

incidents.label: Doctrine March
incidents.summary: A worship bloc pushes public ritual authority into street-level governance.

incidents.label: Control Shift
incidents.summary: A district's civic balance breaks and a new faction seizes the local order.

incidents.label: Control Shift
incidents.summary: A district's civic balance breaks and a new faction seizes the local order.
